heading: Definitions
label: 8801 Definitions
notes: Amendments2022—Pars. (7), (8). added par. (7) and redesignated former par. (7) relating to Subcommittee on Economic and Security Implications as (8).Pub. L. 117–1672021—Pars. (7), (8). added pars. (7) and (8) and struck out former par. (7) which defined “Subcommittee”.Pub. L. 117–81
Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–368, § 1(a)132 Stat. 5092Dec. 21, 2018“This Act [enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘National Quantum Initiative Act’.”
amendments: Amendments2022—Pars. (7), (8). added par. (7) and redesignated former par. (7) relating to Subcommittee on Economic and Security Implications as (8).Pub. L. 117–1672021—Pars. (7), (8). added pars. (7) and (8) and struck out former par. (7) which defined “Subcommittee”.Pub. L. 117–81

children.heading: Advisory Committee
children.label: 1 Advisory Committee
children.text: The term “Advisory Committee” means the National Quantum Initiative Advisory Committee established under .section 8814(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate; and

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology of the House of Representatives.

children.heading: Coordination Office
children.label: 3 Coordination Office
children.text: The term “Coordination Office” means the National Quantum Coordination Office established under .section 8812(a) of this title

children.heading: Institution of higher education
children.label: 4 Institution of higher education
children.text: The term “institution of higher education” has the meaning given the term in .section 1001(a) of title 20

children.heading: Program
children.label: 5 Program
children.text: The term “Program” means the National Quantum Initiative Program implemented under .section 8811(a) of this title

children.heading: Quantum information science
children.label: 6 Quantum information science
children.text: The term “quantum information science” means the use of the laws of quantum physics for the storage, transmission, manipulation, computing, or measurement of information.

children.heading: Quantum network infrastructure
children.label: 7 Quantum network infrastructure
children.text: The term “quantum network infrastructure” means any facility, expertise, or capability that is necessary to enable the development and deployment of scalable and diverse quantum network technologies.

children.heading: Subcommittee on Economic and Security Implications1So in original. Two pars. (8) have been enacted.1
children.label: 8 Subcommittee on Economic and Security Implications1So in original. Two pars. (8) have been enacted.1
children.text: The term “Subcommittee on Economic and Security Implications” means the Subcommittee on the Economic and Security Implications of Quantum Information Science established under .section 8814a(a) of this title

children.heading: Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science1
children.label: 8 Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science1
children.text: The term “Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science” means the Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science of the National Science and Technology Council established under .section 8813(a) of this title
